basic_details.job_title: CSL Safety Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 13 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Cochin Shipyard Limited (CSL) Safety Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 01-07-2026 on the official website www.cochinshipyard.in. A total of 13 vacancies have been announced through the CSL Safety Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation: 3 years for OBC (Non Creamy Layer), 5 years for SC/ST, as per Government of India guidelines for Ex-servicemen (subject to maximum age of 50 years).

qualification.education_qualification: Pass in SSLC, One year Diploma in Safety/Fire from a Government recognized institute or Public Sector Undertaking, Minimum one year training or experience in safety
qualification.details: Pass in SSLC. One year Diploma in Safety/Fire from a Government recognized institute or Public Sector Undertaking. Minimum one year training or experience in safety in a Public Sector Undertaking or Factory or Construction Company or Engineering Company.

selection_process: Certificate Verification Practical Test Physical Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSL Safety Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSL Safety Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CSL Safety Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

CSL Safety Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Pass in SSLC. One year Diploma in Safety/Fire from a Government recognized institute or Public Sector Undertaking. Minimum one year training or experience in safety in a Public Sector Undertaking or Factory or Construction Company or Engineering Company.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSL Safety Assistant Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSL Safety Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSL Safety Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the CSL Safety Assistant posts is 22nd July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Safety Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed SSLC and possess a one-year Diploma in Safety/Fire from a recognized institute. Additionally, a minimum of one year of training or experience in safety is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 45 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST and OBC categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Safety Assistant position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 13 vacancies for the Safety Assistant post on a contract basis at Cochin Shipyard Limited.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for CSL Safety Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹200/- for General, OBC, and PwBD candidates. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Safety Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 23,300/- per month for the contract period.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for CSL Safety Assistant jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves Certificate Verification, a Practical Test, and a Physical Test to assess the suitability of the candidates for the role.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The recruitment for Safety Assistant posts at Cochin Shipyard Limited is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link are available in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official CSL website.

faq.question: Q10. What is the start date for online applications?
faq.answer: The online application process for the CSL Safety Assistant recruitment begins on 30th June 2026.
